docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF NICK TRIGONIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICHARD SIMON IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRIGONIS, NICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIMON, RICHARD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,051.00 FILED BY TRIGONIS, NICK AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
